title: Repacked
description: A small mod that removes the resource pack reloading screen, swapping it out for an asynchronous background reload. It also adds a pack profile system.
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/LR7NbVd.png)](https://bit.ly/3FodDXy)
# Repacked

This mod removes Minecraft’s intrusive resource pack reloading screen and replaces it with smooth, asynchronous background reloading. Plus, it introduces Pack Profiles — automatically apply specific resource packs when joining a singleplayer world or multiplayer server, and disable them when you leave. No more manual toggling every time you play, and it can all be configured in a clean and easy to use UI.

## Features

✔ Asynchronous resource pack reloading\
✔ No more "Reloading Resource Packs..." screen\
✔ Profile-based pack management per world/server\
✔ Fully client-side and Fabric compatible

## Future Updates
- Server version for server resource packs and for sending clients additional information (flags) about the server (ie. Halloween event) so the user can configure conditions for when certain packs should be enabled.
- Integrations with the _Packified_ mod

## Bugs
This mod is still very new, and therefore might contain bugs.
If you find any bugs, or have a feature request, make sure to report them [here](https://github.com/JTechGaming/Repacked/issues).
